name: Yachiyo Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Yachiyo Industry Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells automobile parts in Japan, the Americas, China, Europe, and Asia. It manufactures plastic and steel fuel tanks; tilt inner slide, outer slide, popup, and panorama sunroofs; plastic parts, including bumpers and instrument panels; and motorcycle parts. The company was formerly known as Yachiyo Painting Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yachiyo Industry Co., Ltd. in September 1968. Yachiyo Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Sayama, Japan. Yachiyo Industry Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Honda Motor Co., Ltd.
